subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy gaze toward the sacred realm of the Lord! The soul-consuming cry thou hast raised from the world-consuming fire of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بشطر قدس حضرت پروردگار ناله جانسوزی که از آتش عشق جهانسوز برآوردی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love as fire
